architectureNotes: Tabs' unique tiered PDP pricing adapted as value anchoring ($89 vs $159 + competitor comparison). Ingredient origin story cards transformed into engineering origin cards (medical-grade silicone, air-pulse engine, acoustics, USB-C). Real TikTok embeds with view counts became UGC poster cards with 29next CDN images. Press bar positioned immediately after hero (Section 2) to mirror Tabs' authority-first narrative arc. Social proof (reviews) comes AFTER value demonstration, not before, matching Tabs' confirmation-after-desire flow.
adaptedPatterns: Press bar immediately after hero (Tabs' authority transfer → Nancy's media validation)
Engineering origin cards (Tabs' ingredient provenance → Nancy's material/tech deep dive)
Value anchoring (Tabs' tiered pricing → Nancy's $89 vs $159 + competitor comparison)
UGC poster cards with view counts (Tabs' TikTok embeds → Nancy's video review cards)
Reviews as confirmation AFTER price justification (not upfront)
Benefit pills AFTER press bar (delayed gratification, authority first)
Multiple CTAs after every major proof section (6 total)
Comments section with skeptic-converted + question/reply + enthusiast + partner perspectives
